virtues.name: Fatalism
virtues.description: Acceptance that wyrd is woven—significance lies in meeting the moment you were always meant to face.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Spend to fuel Momentum per Storypath virtue rules in Scion: Hero pantheon chapter.
virtues.source: Scion_Hero_(Final_Download).pdf, Æsir pantheon (Virtues: Fatalism and Audacity)

virtues.name: Audacity
virtues.description: The Norse courage to act boldly even when fate is fixed—deeds matter even if the end is written.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Spend to fuel Momentum per Storypath virtue rules in Scion: Hero pantheon chapter.

virtues.name: Pride
virtues.description: The dignity and drive of a people who refuse to vanish.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.

virtues.name: Dream
virtues.description: Visions, stories, and futures imagined into being.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.

virtues.name: Egotism
virtues.description: The certainty that you are the axis around which the myth turns.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.

virtues.name: Kinship
virtues.description: Bonds of blood, guest‑right, and shared destiny among mortals and gods alike.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.

virtues.name: Balance
virtues.description: Ma’at—right order, right place, right time.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.

virtues.name: Justice
virtues.description: Weighing hearts, punishing isfet, restoring what was broken.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.

virtues.name: Sincerity
virtues.description: Magokoro—true heart brought to action and word.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.
virtues.source: Scion_Hero_(Final_Download).pdf, Kami (Virtues: Sincerity and Right Action)

virtues.name: Right Action
virtues.description: Duty performed faithfully even when it costs.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.

virtues.name: Honor
virtues.description: Face, reputation, and the debts you owe the world.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.
virtues.source: Scion_Hero_(Final_Download).pdf, Tuatha Dé Danann (Virtues: Honor and Prowess—Enech)

virtues.name: Prowess
virtues.description: The skill and courage that prove your honor is not empty boasting.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.

virtues.name: Tradition
virtues.description: Roots, ancestors, and the old agreements that keep communities whole.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.
virtues.source: Scion_Hero_(Final_Download).pdf, Òrìshà and Loa (Virtues: Tradition and Innovation)

virtues.name: Innovation
virtues.description: New forms for old powers—survival through change.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.

virtues.name: Conscience
virtues.description: Dharma inward—the voice that will not let you unsee harm.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.

virtues.name: Duty
virtues.description: Dharma outward—obligation performed without flinching.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.

virtues.name: Yin
virtues.description: Receptive power—shadow, yielding, and what is held in reserve.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.

virtues.name: Yang
virtues.description: Active power—light, motion, and shaping force.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.

virtues.name: Hunger
virtues.description: The cosmic need to consume, grow, and be renewed through sacrifice.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.

virtues.name: Sacrifice
virtues.description: What is given so the sun may rise again.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Hero pantheon write-up.

virtues.name: Tradition
virtues.description: Roots, ancestors, and the ways the lwa and their people have kept faith alive across exile and change.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath virtue rules in Scion: Hero / MotW pantheon Path.
virtues.source: Mysteries_of_the_World_-_Scion_Companion_(Final_Download).pdf — Loa of Haiti (Virtues align with Òrìshà: Tradition and Innovation; see Ogou’s write-up)

virtues.name: Innovation
virtues.description: New forms for old powers—survival, syncretism, and the Petro impulse to transform what cannot be preserved unchanged.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath virtue rules in Scion: Hero / MotW pantheon Path.

virtues.name: Memory
virtues.description: Honoring the past—lore, comrades, prior lives, and the debts owed to what came before.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per MotW Nemetondevos pantheon Path.
virtues.source: Mysteries_of_the_World_-_Scion_Companion_(Final_Download).pdf — Pantheon Path of the Nemetondevos (Memory and Purgation)

virtues.name: Purgation
virtues.description: Letting go so new fate can be written—forgiveness, reinvention, or burning the wicker giant and walking forward.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per MotW Nemetondevos pantheon Path.

virtues.name: Honesty
virtues.description: Truthful word and transparent dealing—Asha as right speech and trustworthy covenant.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per MotW Yazata pantheon Path.
virtues.source: Mysteries_of_the_World_-_Scion_Companion_(Final_Download).pdf — Pantheon Path of the Yazata (Honesty and Free Will)

virtues.name: Free Will
virtues.description: The Ashavan insistence that worthy ends cannot be forced—each soul must choose the good freely.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per MotW Yazata pantheon Path.

virtues.name: Humanity
virtues.description: The stubborn drive to learn, connect, and act as if effort matters—even when the cosmos suggests futility.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Spend for Momentum per Storypath virtue rules in Masks of the Mythos.

virtues.name: Nihilism
virtues.description: The pull toward despair, alienation, and the sense that mortal scales of good and evil do not bind Mythos truth.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Spend for Momentum per Storypath virtue rules in Masks of the Mythos.

virtues.name: Order
virtues.description: Civilization measured against chaos—laws, ziggurats, and rightful stations.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Piety
virtues.description: The debt owed to what came before—ancestors, tablets, and the high heavens.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Duty
virtues.description: The law between worlds that keeps mortals and gods from breaking each other.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Harmony
virtues.description: Dvoeverie—two truths held without tearing the whole.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Reciprocity
virtues.description: What is taken must be returned—in offerings, labor, or story.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Endurance
virtues.description: The long breath of peoples who live in thin air and long memory.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Tapu
virtues.description: Sacred limits—what must not be crossed without price.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Mana
virtues.description: Presence that reshapes the room—authority without apology.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Utang na Loob
virtues.description: Debts of the soul—gratitude, obligation, and the weave of favors.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Kapwa
virtues.description: Shared self—neighbor and stranger folded into one hearth.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Hospitality
virtues.description: The guest is law; the table is covenant.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Lineage
virtues.description: Names recited backward until they touch fire.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Cosmic Order
virtues.description: Days have owners; owners have duties.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Prophecy
virtues.description: What was read at the fire returns at the door.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Courage
virtues.description: To stand in the ring—contest as prayer.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Freedom
virtues.description: The open horizon—no fence that cannot be outridden.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Compassion
virtues.description: Mercy sharpened until it cuts delusion.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Discipline
virtues.description: Vows kept when no one is watching the shrine.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Survival
virtues.description: Island wit—root, reef, and rumor.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.

virtues.name: Reverence
virtues.description: Spirits close enough to taste the salt on your skin.
virtues.mechanicalEffects: Momentum per Storypath rules; confirm wording in your PDF.
